name: Active Setup — Installed Components
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: Active Setup entries run once per user on first logon before the shell loads. StubPath command executes if per-user version counter is lower than system version.
forensic_value: Classic persistence — adding a subkey causes StubPath to run as the user on next logon without Run-key detection.
